title: GitLab Issue
description: A GitLab issue used for tracking work, bugs, feature requests, or incidents within a project.

id.description: The globally unique identifier of the issue.

iid.description: The internal project-scoped ID of the issue.

project_id.description: The ID of the project the issue belongs to.

description.description: The description of the issue, supporting Markdown syntax.

state.description: The current state of the issue.

milestone.description: The milestone the issue is associated with.

assignees.description: Users assigned to work on this issue.

closed_by.description: The user who closed the issue.

confidential.description: Whether the issue is confidential and visible only to project members with Reporter access or above.

weight.description: The weight assigned to the issue for effort estimation. Requires Premium or Ultimate tier.

severity.description: The severity level of the issue. Used for incidents.

upvotes.description: The number of upvotes the issue has received.

downvotes.description: The number of downvotes the issue has received.

user_notes_count.description: The number of user-authored comments on the issue.

merge_requests_count.description: The number of merge requests related to this issue.

web_url.description: The URL to view the issue in a browser.

has_tasks.description: Whether the issue description contains task list items.

due_date.description: The due date of the issue in YYYY-MM-DD format.

created_at.description: The date and time the issue was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the issue was last updated.

closed_at.description: The date and time the issue was closed.

UserSummary.description: A simplified representation of a GitLab user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

state.description: The current state of the user account.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

web_url.description: URL to the user's GitLab profile page.

Milestone.description: A milestone that groups issues and merge requests by a target date.

id.description: The unique identifier of the milestone.

iid.description: The project-scoped ID of the milestone.

project_id.description: The ID of the project the milestone belongs to.

state.description: The current state of the milestone.

due_date.description: The due date of the milestone.

web_url.description: URL to view the milestone in a browser.

relative.description: Relative reference format including project path.

full.description: Full reference format including namespace and project path.

TimeStats.description: Time tracking statistics for the issue.

time_estimate.description: Estimated time to complete the issue in seconds.

total_time_spent.description: Total time logged against the issue in seconds.

human_total_time_spent.description: Human-readable total time spent, for example 30m.

TaskCompletionStatus.description: Completion status for task list items in the issue description.

count.description: Total number of task list items.

completed_count.description: Number of completed task list items.
